serviceDescription: This dataset is intended for read-only use. The purpose of the data is to provide display, identification, and analysis tools for determining current boundary information for Forest Service managers, GIS specialists, and others.

layers.name: Forest Service Regional Boundaries - National Extent
Forest Service Regional Boundaries - Regional Extent

documentInfo.Title: BdyAdm_LSRS_AdministrativeRegion
documentInfo.Comments: This dataset is intended for read-only use. The purpose of the data is to provide display, identification, and analysis tools for determining current boundary information for Forest Service managers, GIS specialists, and others.
documentInfo.Subject: This dataset represents a boundary encompassing all the National Forest System (NFS) lands administered by a Forest Service Region. The area encompasses private lands, other governmental agency lands. All National Forest System lands fall within one and only one Administrative Region.
documentInfo.Keywords: Administrative Region,Region Name,Region Number,Region Boundary,Boundaries,USDA Forest Service
